description_text: Red Black Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Shark Fins Spoiler Lip Wing Splitter Modified Description Condition : 100% Brand New & Unused (Quality Checked before shipping) Composition : 4Pcs Rear diffuser +Screws Great Exterior Upgrade! Color: Red/Black Point to the buttom of the rear bumper ! Excellent exterior effect! By PVC material , It does not broken easily. It is easy install. This item is sure to improve the look of your Exterior. After the correct install steps, you will see your vehicle become more perfectly. Fit: Universal fit Payment Delivery details Terms of sales About us Contact us 1. All payments must be prepaid. 2.Others payment way please message the buyer. 3.Our delivery factory may have several warehouses, and we will randomly choose a closer warehouse to deliver. 4.We will regularly send discounts and benefits to our fans. At the same time, our fans will enjoy the five-year warranty policy of some products(Not all).
